title: Penalties
doc_html:
§390.7. Penalties

           Any person who violates any of the provisions of R.S. 14:390 through 390.6 shall be fined not more than ten thousand dollars or imprisoned at hard labor for not more than six years, or both.

           Added by Acts 1962, No. 245, §1.
doc_text:
§390.7.  Penalties
Any person who violates any of the provisions of R.S. 14:390 through
390.6 shall be fined not more than ten thousand dollars or imprisoned at hard
labor for not more than six years, or both.
Added by Acts 1962, No. 245, §1.
